tasks.title: Fix ConnectMethodDialog
tasks.description: Add 'API Key' method for all non-OAuth-only providers. For OAuth-only providers (Google, Copilot), show 'Not yet implemented' message. Ensure Enter on empty does NOT close silently.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify API-key providers show 'API Key' option
AddUnitTest: verify empty dialog shows explanatory message
AddRegressionTest: verify Enter on empty closes with feedback message
AddUnitTest: verify OAuth-only providers show 'Not yet implemented' message
tasks.impl_notes: Line 21-28: Add 'API Key' method selection. Line 105: Fix modulo by 1 bug for single item navigation.

tasks.title: Implement API Key Input Dialog
tasks.description: Create ApiKeyInputDialog struct implementing Dialog trait. Mask input (show dots, not plain text). Add validation before saving. Wire into dialog flow: Provider Selection -> Auth Method (API Key) -> API Key Input -> Validate -> Save.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify dialog renders correctly with masked input
AddUnitTest: verify input is masked (dots, not plain text)
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify validation fails on invalid key format
AddIntegrationTest: verify full flow from Provider Selection to Save works end-to-end
tasks.impl_notes: Create NEW file: opencode-rust/crates/tui/src/dialogs/api_key_input.rs. Mask input using password mode in ratatui.

tasks.title: Dynamic Provider Registry
tasks.description: Remove hardcoded ['openai', 'anthropic', 'ollama'] at line 94 in providers.rs. Read providers dynamically from ModelRegistry. Match provider list with ConnectProviderDialog (18 providers).
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify providers CLI lists all 18 providers
AddRegressionTest: verify list matches TUI dialog options exactly
AddUnitTest: verify no duplicate providers in output
AddIntegrationTest: verify ModelRegistry is source of truth for provider list
tasks.impl_notes: Line 94 in crates/cli/src/cmd/providers.rs. Remove hardcoded list, use ModelRegistry::list_providers().

tasks.title: Fix modulo by 1 bug
tasks.description: Fix line 105 in connect_method.rs: Change '(self.selected_index + 1) % self.methods.len().max(1)'. When methods.len() is 0, don't use modulo at all - just stay at index 0.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify single item + Down stays at index 0
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify empty list + navigation doesn't cause index issues
AddUnitTest: verify modulo is not used when methods list is empty
tasks.impl_notes: Line 105: Fix navigation logic. When methods.len() == 0, selected_index should remain 0.

tasks.title: Expanded Model Catalog
tasks.description: Add github-copilot/* models, opencode/gpt-5-nano, opencode/minimax-m2.5-free, opencode/nemotron-3-super-free, google/antigravity-* models, kimi/* models, z.ai/* models. Target 50+ models total.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify model catalog contains 50+ models
AddUnitTest: verify all original provider models are still available
AddUnitTest: verify model context lengths are displayed correctly
AddRegressionTest: verify existing model functionality not broken
tasks.impl_notes: File: crates/llm/src/models.rs. Add models in provider sections: github-copilot, opencode, google, kimi, z.ai.

tasks.title: Shell Completion Command
tasks.description: Create completion command module supporting bash, zsh, fish, PowerShell. Output completion script to stdout. Add command to CLI registry.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify 'opencode completion bash' generates valid bash completions
AddIntegrationTest: verify 'opencode completion zsh' generates valid zsh completions
AddIntegrationTest: verify completions work for all CLI commands
AddUnitTest: verify all 4 shell types generate output
tasks.impl_notes: Create NEW file: crates/cli/src/cmd/completion.rs. Command structure: opencode completion [SHELL].

tasks.title: Plugin CLI Commands
tasks.description: Create plugin command module with subcommands: plugin install <name>, plugin list, plugin remove <name>, plugin search [query]. Persist plugins in opencode.json config. Add to CLI registry.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify plugin install <name> installs and persists plugin
AddIntegrationTest: verify plugin list shows installed plugins
AddIntegrationTest: verify plugin remove <name> removes plugin
AddIntegrationTest: verify plugin search [query] finds matching plugins
AddRegressionTest: verify plugins persist across CLI restarts
tasks.impl_notes: Create NEW file: crates/cli/src/cmd/plugin.rs. Persist in opencode.json config file.

tasks.title: PR Command Implementation
tasks.description: Remove stub implementation at lines 39-40. Implement PR fetch functionality: pr <number> fetch PR details, pr checkout <number> checkout PR branch, pr list list recent PRs. Use GitHub API.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify pr <number> fetches and displays PR details from GitHub API
AddIntegrationTest: verify pr checkout <number> checks out PR branch locally
AddIntegrationTest: verify pr list shows recent PRs
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify error handling for invalid PR numbers
tasks.impl_notes: File: crates/cli/src/cmd/pr.rs. Remove stub at lines 39-40. Use github.com API for PR data.

tasks.title: ConnectMethodDialog Tests
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify empty methods + Enter closes dialog
AddUnitTest: verify empty methods + navigation doesn't panic
AddUnitTest: verify single item + Down at end stays at 0
AddRegressionTest: verify empty state renders visible message with border
tasks.impl_notes: File: crates/tui/src/dialogs/connect_method.rs. Follow TDD approach - write tests first.

tasks.title: GitHub Integration Completion
tasks.description: Remove TODO messages at lines 80-86. Implement GitHubAction::Login (OAuth flow), GitHubAction::RepoList (list user repositories), GitHubAction::IssueList { repo } (list issues for repo).
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify GitHub OAuth login flow completes successfully
AddIntegrationTest: verify repository listing shows user's repositories
AddIntegrationTest: verify issue listing shows repo issues
AddRegressionTest: verify GitHub command no longer has TODO messages
tasks.impl_notes: File: crates/cli/src/cmd/github.rs. Remove TODOs at lines 80-86.

tasks.title: ConnectModelDialog Tests
tasks.description: Add rendering and interaction tests: test_connect_model_dialog_empty_list_enter_closes, test_connect_model_dialog_empty_list_up_does_not_panic, test_connect_model_dialog_single_item_down_stays_at_zero, test_connect_model_dialog_renders_empty_state, test_connect_model_dialog_renders_models.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify empty list + Enter closes dialog
AddUnitTest: verify empty list + navigation doesn't panic
AddUnitTest: verify single item + Down stays at 0
AddRegressionTest: verify empty state renders with border

tasks.title: OAuth Flows for Google/Copilot
tasks.description: Implement Google OAuth flow and GitHub Copilot OAuth flow. Update ConnectMethodDialog for OAuth-only providers. Providers needing OAuth: Google, GitHub Copilot.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify Google OAuth login flow completes successfully
AddIntegrationTest: verify GitHub Copilot OAuth login flow completes successfully
AddUnitTest: verify OAuth-only providers are correctly identified in ConnectMethodDialog
AddRegressionTest: verify non-OAuth providers still work with API key method
